parameters.query:
-- T1: Direct evaluation_id lookup — no polling for pending status.
-- Fetch all battle_results for this evaluation's test_run.
SELECT
  br.id as battle_result_id,
  br.test_run_id,
  br.persona_id,
  br.outcome,
  br.turns,
  br.transcript,
  p.name as persona_name,
  p.category as persona_category,
  p.personaprompt as persona_description,
  tr.prompt_version_id,
  $2::uuid as evaluation_id
FROM battle_results br
JOIN test_runs tr ON tr.id = br.test_run_id
JOIN personas p ON p.id = br.persona_id
WHERE br.test_run_id = $1::uuid
ORDER BY br.created_at ASC

=INSERT INTO battle_evaluations (evaluation_id, battle_result_id, score, criteria_scores, outcome, summary, strengths, weaknesses, raw_response, evaluator_version) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3, $4::jsonb, $5, $6, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, $10) ON CONFLICT (evaluation_id, battle_result_id) DO UPDATE SET score=EXCLUDED.score, criteria_scores=EXCLUDED.criteria_scores, outcome=EXCLUDED.outcome, summary=EXCLUDED.summary, strengths=EXCLUDED.strengths, weaknesses=EXCLUDED.weaknesses, raw_response=EXCLUDED.raw_response, evaluator_version=EXCLUDED.evaluator_version, evaluated_at=now() RETURNING id, evaluation_id, '{{ $json.model_used || '' }}' as model_used, {{ $json.tokens_used !== null && $json.tokens_used !== undefined ? $json.tokens_used : 'NULL' }} as tokens_used

WITH eval_data AS (SELECT be.score, be.outcome, be.criteria_scores, be.summary, be.strengths, be.weaknesses, br.turns, br.outcome as original_outcome, p.name as persona_name, p.category as persona_category FROM battle_evaluations be JOIN battle_results br ON be.battle_result_id = br.id JOIN personas p ON br.persona_id = p.id WHERE br.test_run_id = $1::uuid), stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('success','successo')) as success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('partial','successo_parziale')) as partial_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('failure','fallimento')) as failure_count, ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,2) as avg_score, ROUND(MIN(score)::numeric,2) as min_score, ROUND(MAX(score)::numeric,2) as max_score FROM eval_data), persona_perf AS (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('persona',persona_name,'category',persona_category,'score',score,'outcome',outcome,'turns',turns,'summary',summary,'strengths',strengths,'weaknesses',weaknesses) ORDER BY score ASC) as personas FROM eval_data), criteria_avg AS (SELECT json_object_agg(key, ROUND(avg_val::numeric,2)) as criteria_breakdown FROM (SELECT kv.key, AVG(kv.value::text::numeric) as avg_val FROM eval_data, LATERAL jsonb_each(CASE jsonb_typeof(criteria_scores) WHEN 'object' THEN criteria_scores WHEN 'array' THEN (SELECT jsonb_object_agg(elem->>'criteria_name', elem->'score') FROM jsonb_array_elements(criteria_scores) elem) ELSE '{}'::jsonb END) AS kv(key,value) WHERE criteria_scores IS NOT NULL GROUP BY kv.key) sub) SELECT json_build_object('test_run_id',$1::uuid,'overall_stats',(SELECT row_to_json(stats) FROM stats),'criteria_breakdown',(SELECT criteria_breakdown FROM criteria_avg),'conversations_detail',(SELECT personas FROM persona_perf)) as analysis_context

parameters.text:
=# Test Run Data
{{ JSON.stringify($json.analysis_context, null, 2) }}
# Instructions
Analyze and return JSON with summary, overall_assessment, top_issues, strengths, criteria_analysis, suggestions.

parameters.query: UPDATE test_runs SET status = 'completed', analysis_report = $1::jsonb, analyzed_at = $2, completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $3::uuid RETURNING id, status, analyzed_at
UPDATE test_runs SET status='failed', completed_at=NOW(), analysis_report=$1::jsonb, analyzed_at=NOW(), stopped_reason='evaluator_error' WHERE id=$2::uuid RETURNING id, status

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: true, message: $json.error, details: $json.message || $json.raw || null }) }}, {{ $json.test_run_id }}

parameters.query:
-- T1: Use test_run_id directly from webhook payload
UPDATE test_runs SET status='evaluating', last_heartbeat_at=NOW() WHERE id=$1::uuid RETURNING id as test_run_id, test_run_code, status

-- T1/T2/T3: Fetch evaluator config by evaluator_config_id from webhook.
-- Falls back to JOIN via test_run. Includes llm_config (T3).
SELECT ec.id, ec.name, ec.version, ec.criteria, ec.system_prompt_template, ec.success_config, ec.llm_config
FROM evaluator_configs ec
WHERE ec.id = COALESCE($1::uuid, (SELECT ec2.id FROM evaluator_configs ec2 JOIN test_runs tr ON tr.prompt_version_id=ec2.prompt_version_id WHERE tr.id=$2::uuid AND ec2.status='active' ORDER BY ec2.is_promoted DESC, ec2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1))
AND ec.status='active' LIMIT 1

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Extract Test Run Info').item.json.evaluator_config_id }}, {{ $('Extract Test Run Info').item.json.test_run_id }}

parameters.query:
=-- T3/T4: Mark evaluation completed, write model_used + tokens_used.
-- T7b: overall_score excludes outcome='error' rows (parse failures have null score).
UPDATE evaluations SET status='completed', completed_at=now(),
  overall_score=(SELECT ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,2) FROM battle_evaluations WHERE evaluation_id='{{ $json.evaluation_id }}'::uuid AND outcome IS DISTINCT FROM 'error'),
  success_count=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM battle_evaluations WHERE evaluation_id='{{ $json.evaluation_id }}'::uuid AND outcome IN ('success','successo')),
  failure_count=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM battle_evaluations WHERE evaluation_id='{{ $json.evaluation_id }}'::uuid AND outcome IN ('failure','fallimento')),
  partial_count=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM battle_evaluations WHERE evaluation_id='{{ $json.evaluation_id }}'::uuid AND outcome IN ('partial','successo_parziale')),
  model_used='{{ $json.model_used || '' }}',
  tokens_used={{ $json.tokens_used !== null && $json.tokens_used !== undefined ? $json.tokens_used : 'NULL' }}
WHERE id='{{ $json.evaluation_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING *

-- T1: evaluation_id from webhook - mark running, snapshot criteria + llm_config (T4).
INSERT INTO evaluations (id, test_run_id, evaluator_config_id, status, started_at, triggered_by, criteria_snapshot, llm_config_snapshot)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, 'running', NOW(), 'n8n', $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET status='running', started_at=NOW(), completed_at=NULL, error_message=NULL,
  criteria_snapshot=COALESCE(evaluations.criteria_snapshot, EXCLUDED.criteria_snapshot),
  llm_config_snapshot=COALESCE(evaluations.llm_config_snapshot, EXCLUDED.llm_config_snapshot)
RETURNING id as evaluation_id, test_run_id, evaluator_config_id, status, criteria_snapshot, llm_config_snapshot

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Extract Test Run Info').item.json.evaluation_id }}, {{ $('Extract Test Run Info').item.json.test_run_id }}, {{ $json.id }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.criteria || []) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.llm_config || {}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const firstItem = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { test_run_id: firstItem.test_run_id, evaluation_id: firstItem.evaluation_id } }];

parameters.query:
-- T2/REQ-T2.7: Fetch criteria_definitions for validation and enrichment.
SELECT cd.name, cd.description, cd.scoring_guide, cd.category, cd.domain_type, cd.weight_default
FROM criteria_definitions cd
WHERE cd.name = ANY($1::text[])
=UPDATE evaluations SET has_analysis = false WHERE test_run_id = '{{ $('Extract Test Run Info').item.json.test_run_id }}'
=UPDATE evaluations SET has_analysis = true WHERE test_run_id = '{{ $json.test_run_id }}'

-- T1: Direct evaluation_id lookup — no polling for pending status.
-- Fetch all battle_results for this evaluation's test_run.
SELECT
  br.id as battle_result_id,
  br.test_run_id,
  br.persona_id,
  br.outcome,

  p.name as persona_name,
  p.category as persona_category,
  p.personaprompt as persona_description,
  tr.prompt_version_id,
  $2::uuid as evaluation_id
FROM battle_results br
JOIN test_runs tr ON tr.id = br.test_run_id
JOIN personas p ON p.id = br.persona_id
WHERE br.test_run_id = $1::uuid
ORDER BY br.created_at ASC

=INSERT INTO battle_evaluations (evaluation_id, battle_result_id, score, criteria_scores, outcome, summary, strengths, weaknesses, raw_response, evaluator_version) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3, $4::jsonb, $5, $6, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, $10) ON CONFLICT (evaluation_id, battle_result_id) DO UPDATE SET score=EXCLUDED.score, criteria_scores=EXCLUDED.criteria_scores, outcome=EXCLUDED.outcome, summary=EXCLUDED.summary, strengths=EXCLUDED.strengths, weaknesses=EXCLUDED.weaknesses, raw_response=EXCLUDED.raw_response, evaluator_version=EXCLUDED.evaluator_version, evaluated_at=now() RETURNING id, evaluation_id, '{{ $json.model_used || '' }}' as model_used, {{ $json.tokens_used !== null && $json.tokens_used !== undefined ? $json.tokens_used : 'NULL' }} as tokens_used

WITH eval_data AS (SELECT be.score, be.outcome, be.criteria_scores, be.summary, be.strengths, be.weaknesses, br.turns, br.outcome as original_outcome, p.name as persona_name, p.category as persona_category FROM battle_evaluations be JOIN battle_results br ON be.battle_result_id = br.id JOIN personas p ON br.persona_id = p.id WHERE br.test_run_id = $1::uuid), stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('success','successo')) as success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('partial','successo_parziale')) as partial_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('failure','fallimento')) as failure_count, ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,2) as avg_score, ROUND(MIN(score)::numeric,2) as min_score, ROUND(MAX(score)::numeric,2) as max_score FROM eval_data), persona_perf AS (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('persona',persona_name,'category',persona_category,'score',score,'outcome',outcome,'turns',turns,'summary',summary,'strengths',strengths,'weaknesses',weaknesses) ORDER BY score ASC) as personas FROM eval_data), criteria_avg AS (SELECT json_object_agg(key, ROUND(avg_val::numeric,2)) as criteria_breakdown FROM (SELECT kv.key, AVG(kv.value::text::numeric) as avg_val FROM eval_data, LATERAL jsonb_each(CASE jsonb_typeof(criteria_scores) WHEN 'object' THEN criteria_scores WHEN 'array' THEN (SELECT jsonb_object_agg(elem->>'criteria_name', elem->'score') FROM jsonb_array_elements(criteria_scores) elem) ELSE '{}'::jsonb END) AS kv(key,value) WHERE criteria_scores IS NOT NULL GROUP BY kv.key) sub) SELECT json_build_object('test_run_id',$1::uuid,'overall_stats',(SELECT row_to_json(stats) FROM stats),'criteria_breakdown',(SELECT criteria_breakdown FROM criteria_avg),'conversations_detail',(SELECT personas FROM persona_perf)) as analysis_context
